text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Meisho Doto in the hallway. She looks
awfully tired.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, why is there a bucket here? Huh, and a
m-mop, too?! It's all knocked o—nooo, not the
window!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She collides with about every object that falls in
her path. This looks like a bad case of fatigue.
